commit.subject: LU-0000 ptlrc: ptlrpc: extend sec bulk functionality
commit.message:
LU-0000 ptlrc: ptlrpc: extend sec bulk functionality

DO NOT CONSIDER

This combines all of the sec bulk rework patches to ease
testing for a specific thing.  Not intended for anything
else.

Features such as client-side-data-compression and unaligned
direct I/O need page/buffer pools for good performance.

This patch extends sec bulk functionality to allocate different
size buffers. Memory shrinking and other usefull features
should still work as expected.

Test-Parameters: forjanitoronly
Signed-off-by: Artem Blagodarenko <ablagodarenko@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I8defcbfbf8365f3b452c1aab5c38ab242fa67afc
